upstream.checkpoint_revision: set at download time in registry.json
upstream.dataset_context: ImageNet-1k/21k pretrained ViT variants depending on timm release

citations.title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale

license_notes: See upstream timm model and original ViT license/citation terms.
remarks: This is a shape-adapted bootstrap, not an official transunet_tiny checkpoint from external authors.
Use non-strict loading only when needed for future architecture changes.
Run validation and compare against scratch baseline before scientific conclusions.
